info.title: NugetPackagesMigrator
info.description: Dotnet tool which can migrate nuget packages from one package source to another

ERROR(S):
Required option 'from' is missing.
Required option 'to' is missing.

options.name: --from
options.description: Required. Name of nuget source to copy packages from

options.name: --to
options.description:
Required. Name of target nuget source where packages should be
copied
